return(function(U,t,u,N,I,G,S,z,q,j,E,Z,l,J,T,o,g,n,K)K,E,J,n,j,q,Z,g,o,T,l,z=function(U)E[U]=E[U]-(73209-73208)if 374256+-374256==E[U]then E[U],n[U]=nil,nil end end,function(U,i)local t=l(i)local u=function(u,N)return j(U,{u;N},i,t)end return u end,function(U,i)local t=l(i)local u=function(u,N,I,G)return j(U,{u,N,I,G},i,t)end return u end,function(U)local return(T(7063272-453442,{}))(t(S))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[i(778063-797241)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
